zh.lifeSummary: 當Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell於1325年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾道格拉斯 卡素時，他的父親Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston39歲，母親Lady Joan Lovel20歲。他於1362年7月23日與Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1361年被列為constable of edinburgh castle。他去世於1400年12月24日在蘇格蘭吉德布萊次爾享年75歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾波維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell于1325年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾道格拉斯 卡素时，他的父亲Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston39岁，母亲Lady Joan Lovel20岁。他于1362年7月23日与Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1361年被列为constable of edinburgh castle。他去世于1400年12月24日在苏格兰吉德布萊次爾享年75岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰藍納可爾波維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Archibald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

variants.name: Archibold
meanings: Of Norman French origin, from a Germanic (Frankish) personal name derived from ercan ‘genuine’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. It has long been associated with Scotland, where it is in regular use as the English equivalent of Gaelic Gilleasbaig ( see Gillespie ).

en.lifeSummary: When Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell was born in 1325, in Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston, was 39 and his mother, Lady Joan Lovel, was 20. He married Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas on 23 July 1362. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. In 1361, at the age of 36, his occupation is listed as constable of edinburgh castle. He died on 24 December 1400, in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, at the age of 75, and was buried in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell est né en 1325, à Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan Lovel, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas le 23 juillet 1362. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. En 1361, à l’âge de 36 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est constable of edinburgh castle. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1400, à Kirkcudbrightshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell 1325 in Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston 39 und seine Mutter Lady Joan Lovel 20. Er hat am 23. Juli 1362 Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1361, als er 36 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als constable of edinburgh castle aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1400 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland und wurde in Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell è nato il nel 1325 nel Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan Lovel, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas il 23 luglio 1362. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1361, all'età di 36 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come constable of edinburgh castle. Morì il 24 dicembre 1400, nel Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwellが1325年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアドウグラス カストルで生まれた時，父Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermistonは39歳，母Lady Joan Lovelは20歳であった。1362年7月23日にJoanna Moray Countess of Douglasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1361年，36歳の時，職業はconstable of edinburgh castleと記録されている。彼は1400年12月24日にスコットランドキルククウドブリトシュアイアで75歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアボスウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell(이)가 1325년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 더글라스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan Lovel(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1362년 7월 23일 Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1361년, 36세의 나이로 그의 직업은 constable of edinburgh castle이었다. 그는 1400년 12월 24일 스컷랜드 커크쿠드브라이츠히르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 벗웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell nasceu em 1325, em Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan Lovel, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas em 23 de julho de 1362. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1361, com 36 anos, sua profissão aparece como constable of edinburgh castle. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1400, em Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell родился в 1325 г. в местности доуглас кастл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan Lovel, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas 23 июля 1362 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. В 1361 году, в возрасте 36 лет,  он работал по профессии constable of edinburgh castle. Он умер 24 декабря 1400 г. в местности кирккудбраицхир, Шотландия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности ботвелл, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Archibald Douglas 3rd Earl of Douglas Earl of Wigtown Lord of Galloway and Bothwell nació en 1325, en Douglas Castle, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir James The Black Douglas Lord of Hermiston, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Lady Joan Lovel, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Joanna Moray Countess of Douglas el 23 de julio de 1362. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1361, a la edad de 36 años, su ocupación registrada era constable of edinburgh castle. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1400, en Kirkcudbrightshire, Scotland, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Bothwell, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
